description: Runs any workflow on a FabricFlow agent, using an existing instance or creating a new one.
author: FabricFlow Team

workflow_name.description: Name of the workflow to run.

agent_id.description: Base URL of the FabricFlow agent to connect to (e.g. http://127.0.0.1:8000).

params.description: Input parameter dict forwarded to the workflow. Leave empty if the workflow requires no inputs.

use_existing_instance.description: If true, reuse the instance identified by instance_guid instead of creating a new one.

instance_guid.description: GUID of an existing instance to reuse. Required when use_existing_instance is true.

execution_mode.description: Execution mode: 'sync' (wait for result) or 'async' (return immediately).

ttl_seconds.description: Time-to-live for newly created instances, in seconds.

session_guid.description: Existing session GUID to attach the instance to. A new session is created if not provided.

outputs.description: Output values returned by the workflow.

instance_guid.description: GUID of the workflow instance used. Can be reused in subsequent runs.
